query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT contract_external_id) AS total_contracts,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN contract_status = 'ยกเลิกสัญญา' THEN contract_external_id END) AS cancelled_with_status,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN contract_status IS NULL OR contract_status = '' THEN contract_external_id END) AS no_status
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365';

  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN contract_status IS NULL OR contract_status = '' THEN contract_external_id END) AS no_status
FROM debt_collected_cache
